title: The Duel Turns Desperate
description: On pages 18–21, this part focuses on the duel turns desperate, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Duel Turns Desperate. Usopp and Chopper endure brutal attacks and keep fighting for Luffy, Vivi, and the crew’s promise. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Second! The world's weirdest eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Fine, fine! I'll get serious!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm gonna fight seriously now!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Bring it...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You still aren't aware of my Name-name fruit's capable- ties, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What's most impressive is its vast memory! Using it...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: J can create such a facial montage!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: See it and laugh until you're full of openings!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: First! The world's weirdest Read!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: Third! The world's weirdest nose!

dialogue.speaker: Lassoo
dialogue.text: Last! The world's weirdest mouth!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: 90% of that was, like... Your own face, dude.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Opening spotted!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Stop fooling around, you piece of crap!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Have you no heart!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I ain't got time for your pitiful one-man act.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: An act!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Naaayy!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: A mere act it is not!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: I've once come across a certain man... who was unable to harm me because of his friendship...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Oh, pfft...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: I think I have a good idea what you're planning...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Gahaha! I'd like to see you try to hurt me n-

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: H-HOW COULD YOU!? Isn't this your friend's face!? Just what do you think of your friends as, you monster!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: No matter how much you try to change your face, you're still you.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Pathetic... I'm not gonna fall for something as stupid as that.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Because people are defined not by their faces,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: But by their hearts!

summary: This part develops the duel turns desperate and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
